SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:16 am
Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, Clerk K. Liu, nothing on record, Dept. 525
Cause called for Small claims Appeal. Appellant Francis Wong present in pro per. Respondent HMW and JK Enterprises dba Asia Pacific Groups present through office manager Salem Evans, VP Lydia Chiting and President Joseph Kong. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig.


EXRA: Copy of Employment Contract marked.

Exhibit retained, case submitted
